note: R17 kickoff: Apple Pay + Google Pay vía Web Payment Request API
Auditoría de stack: api/index.js (5770 lines), handler stripe/intent en línea 4105
Patrón Volvix.* y volvix-*-wiring.js identificado para cliente
volvix-payments-wallets.js creado: namespace Volvix.wallets
isApplePayAvailable() check window.ApplePaySession + canMakePayments()
isGooglePayAvailable() check window.PaymentRequest || google.payments.api
payWithApple(): ApplePaySession v3, onvalidatemerchant, onpaymentauthorized, oncancel
payWithGoogle(): PaymentRequest API con tokenizationSpecification gateway=stripe
Ambos integran POST /api/payments/stripe/intent (Stripe enruta wallets auto)
GET /api/payments/wallets/config agregado (apple_merchant_id, google_merchant_id, networks)
POST /api/payments/wallets/validate-merchant agregado con mTLS real + placeholder 503 si no hay cert
Lectura de cert/key desde APPLE_PAY_MERCHANT_CERT_PATH / APPLE_PAY_MERCHANT_KEY_PATH
db/R17_WALLETS.sql creado: tabla wallet_payments(id, sale_id, provider, token_data jsonb, status, amount_cents, ts)
Constraint provider in (apple|google|stripe) + índices sale/provider/status/ts
RLS habilitado: select authenticated, write service_role only
Trigger updated_at + FK opcional a volvix_ventas (defensive)
node --check api/index.js => SYNTAX OK
R17_WALLETS.md reporte generado
Deploy a Vercel ejecutado
Verificación: endpoints registrados en handlers map
Slice 100 cerrada — R17 listo para integración UI
